[[Memit Nadill]] used this '''starship''' to travel from [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]].<ref name="TOTJ5" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
